title: Adding TPU, Trainium and More Models
title_translation: 新增 TPU、Trainium 及更多模型支持

paragraphs.source: Currently, we continuously benchmark DeepSeek R1 and GPT OSS 120B (previously Llama 3.1 70B as well). To keep up with the newest model architectures, we plan on adding DeepSeek V3.2 (w/ DSA), DeepSeek V4 on Day 0, Kimi K2.5, Qwen3, GLM5, and many more over the course of the next few months. We will also eventually add multi-modal models and be using EPD & CFD (invented by TogetherAI) optimization too.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Currently, we continuously benchmark DeepSeek R1 and GPT OSS 120B (previously Llama 3.1 70B as well). To keep up with the newest model architectures, we plan on adding DeepSeek V3.2 (w/ DSA), DeepSeek V4 on Day 0, Kimi K2.5, Qwen3, GLM5, and many more over the course of the next few months. We will also eventually add multi-modal models and be using EPD & CFD (invented by TogetherAI) optimization too.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Currently, we continuously benchmark DeepSeek R1 and GPT OSS 120B (previously Llama 3.1 70B as well). To keep up with the newest model architectures, we plan on adding DeepSeek V3.2 (w/ DSA), DeepSeek V4 on Day 0, Kimi K2.5, Qwen3, GLM5, and many more over the course of the next few months. We will also eventually add multi-modal models and be using EPD & CFD (invented by TogetherAI) optimization too.

pro.text: 目前，我们持续对 DeepSeek R1 和 GPT OSS 120B（此前也涵盖 Llama 3.1 70B）进行基准测试。为了紧跟最新模型架构，我们计划在未来几个月内，陆续引入 DeepSeek V3.2（带 DSA）、首发 (Day 0) 支持 DeepSeek V4，以及 Kimi K2.5、Qwen3、GLM5 等众多模型。我们最终还将加入多模态模型，并采用 EPD 与 CFD（由 TogetherAI 发明）优化技术。

paragraphs.source: In addition to new models, we are actively working on adding both TPU and Trainium.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In addition to new models, we are actively working on adding both TPU and Trainium.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In addition to new models, we are actively working on adding both TPU and Trainium.

pro.text: 除了新模型，我们正积极推进 TPU 与 Trainium 的适配工作。
